languages.text: "Кому-то придется погибнуть... но в будущем это принесет пользу 32-му полку. Искупление для одного. Тот случай, когда лозунг всецело оправдан".
"Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."
languages.original_text: "Кому-то придется погибнуть... но в будущем это принесет пользу 32-му полку. Искупление для одного. Тот случай, когда лозунг всецело оправдан".

traits.locale_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."
"Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Freedom for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."
"Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Freedom for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."
"Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

languages.text: 「中には死ななければならない者もいるだろう…しかし、未来においては、第32連隊にとって有益となるだろう。一人への自由。このスローガンは、一度だけ正当に用いられる」
languages.original_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Freedom for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

traits.locale_text: 「中には死ななければならない者もいるだろう…しかし、未来においては、第32連隊にとって有益となるだろう。一人への自由。このスローガンは、一度だけ正当に用いられる。」

languages.text: «Algunos morirán... pero, en el futuro, el 32.º regimiento será más fuerte por ello. Expiación para el último. Por una vez, el lema es una certeza».
languages.original_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

traits.locale_text: «Algunos morirán... pero, en el futuro, el 32.º regimiento será más fuerte por ello. Expiación para el último. Por una vez, el lema es una certeza».

languages.text: “牺牲在所难免……但为了第32团的未来，一切都值得。为了一人之赎——这一次，我们会真正践行这句誓言。”
languages.original_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

traits.locale_text: “牺牲在所难免……但为了第32团的未来，一切都值得。为了一人之赎——这一次，我们会真正践行这句誓言。”

languages.text: "Es wird Tote geben, aber ... auf lange Sicht wird das 32. Regiment davon profitieren. Sühne für den Einzelnen. Jetzt ist die Parole ausnahmsweise mal berechtigt."
languages.original_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

traits.locale_text: "Es wird Tote geben, aber ... auf lange Sicht wird das 32. Regiment davon profitieren. Sühne für den Einzelnen. Jetzt ist die Parole ausnahmsweise mal berechtigt."

languages.text: "Bazılarının ölmesi gerekecek... Fakat gelecekte bu, 32. Alay'ın yararına olacak. Sona kalana kefaret. Şiar, ilk kez tamamen yerini buluyor."
languages.original_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

traits.locale_text: "Bazılarının ölmesi gerekecek... Fakat gelecekte bu, 32. Alay'ın yararına olacak. Sona kalana kefaret. Şiar, ilk kez tamamen yerini buluyor."

languages.text: « Il y aura des morts... mais c'est dans l'intérêt futur du 32e régiment. Expiation pour un seul. Cette devise n'a jamais été aussi vraie. »
languages.original_text: "Some will have to die... but in the future, it will benefit the 32nd Regiment. Atonement for the one. For once, the slogan is fully warranted."

traits.locale_text: « Il y aura des morts... mais c'est dans l'intérêt futur du 32e régiment. Expiation pour un seul. Cette devise n'a jamais été aussi vraie. »
